data.text/markdown:
Narrative layer

Semantic search + topic clustering over persisted post embeddings (paraphrase-multilingual-mpnet-base-v2, handles English / Swahili / Sheng). Run embed_new to cover the full corpus before reading topics - clusters sharpen with more data.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='vblA-0' random-id='82371e47-8b2d-cc0d-86dd-13da3e4e45ae'><marimo-text data-initial-value='"IEBC cannot be trusted, the election will be rigged"' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eSemantic search\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-placeholder='""' data-kind='"text"' data-full-width='true' data-disabled='false' data-debounce='true'></marimo-text></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='bkHC-0' random-id='ecd68301-8c92-7e98-78f5-85267372679f'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"sim\":0.7611449360847473,\"author_handle\":\"kiprotich26kco\",\"text\":\"@citizentvkenya Something is wrong with our electoral system. Bribery &amp; theft in broad day. I visited https://t.co/taip3AdyrL to check my details on to be shut out. I don't trust iebc at all. Not even their election results. https://t.co/UyT4nl76V6\"},{\"sim\":0.7406249046325684,\"author_handle\":\"SamuelKisika\",\"text\":\"As Kenya gears up to August 2027 general election, it's now clear the current electoral commission @IEBCKenya under the chairmanship of @EEEthekon is the most incompetent polls body when it can't enforce Elections Laws on voter bribery in a parliamentary by-election.@NelsonHavi\"},{\"sim\":0.7208913564682007,\"author_handle\":\"IEBCKenya\",\"text\":\"Press Release: \\nClaims by Persons Purporting to Stage Election Manipulation in the 2027 General Election\\n\\nIEBC notes with grave concern recent utterances by certain political actors alleging that they will influence the electoral process in the 2027 presidential election through extra- legal mechanisms. \\n\\nThese utterances, which have elicited considerable disquiet within the electoral environment, pose a real risk of distorting public perception of Kenya\\u2019s democratic processes. IEBC considers such utterances to be unacceptable, reckless, and entirely baseless. \\n\\nThe utterances are clearly intended to instill fear, mislead the public and erode confidence in the integrity of the electoral system. IEBC therefore, urges all Kenyans to disregard, dissociate and refrain from amplifying them.\\n\\nDownload: https://t.co/le42ZZIgHv\\n#16thJulyByelection  #YourVoteYourFuture   #TalkWithIEBC   #StopFakeNews\"},{\"sim\":0.7132401466369629,\"author_handle\":\"illosokuan\",\"text\":\"If the reports from Ol Kalou are true, then voter bribery is illegal and a serious attack on democracy. The IEBC must act decisively and hold everyone accountable. No political party should be above the law. #OlKalou #StopVoterBribery #ProtectDemocracy #KenyaPolitics\"},{\"sim\":0.6905847787857056,\"author_handle\":\"Dr_AustinOmondi\",\"text\":\"There has never been a rigged election in Kenya. To suggest that someone can subvert the will of Kenyans by rigging is unbelievable. We meet at the ballot in 2027.\"},{\"sim\":0.6899867653846741,\"author_handle\":\"JohnWangigi1\",\"text\":\"@IEBCKenya Is this not voter bribery? This is what erodes Kenyan trust on you. if you can't manage  a credible by-election, what of a general election? @MarthaKarua @OkiyaOmtatah @LawSocietyofKe @skmusyoka @citizentvkenya\"},{\"sim\":0.6854814291000366,\"author_handle\":\"BundiKirianki\",\"text\":\"@mwabilimwagodi2 Collude with IEBC to inflate voter register by including underages,foreigners and dead-voters. Shut off the media. Shut off network. We are doomed\"},{\"sim\":0.6852655410766602,\"author_handle\":\"MigunaMiguna\",\"text\":\"Zero legislative record. Zero oversight. Zero vision. Zero ideology. Just PR.\\n\\nBut the compromised Infotrak keeps trying to manufacture fake polls as part of the overall strategy of keeping the politics of Kenya an organized BANDITRY! It won\\u2019t work this time! https://t.co/T2EZbemrr3\"},{\"sim\":0.6787127256393433,\"author_handle\":\"RefariiHen\",\"text\":\"@HonMoses_Kuria This is voter bribery. IEBC should take action\"},{\"sim\":0.6623153686523438,\"author_handle\":\"ouma_neko\",\"text\":\"The 2027 elections will not be free, fair, transparent, credible, or verifiable. \\n\\nRuto is scared, and many fear he could rig the election and even declare a state of emergency. https://t.co/RDbTBoLJ9W\"}]"' data-total-rows='12' data-total-columns='3' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["sim",["number","float32"]],["author_handle",["string","str"]],["text",["string","str"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-search='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/html: Sentiment / emotion over 18,321 labelled posts

Sentiment by region

Sentiment by community (EXPERIMENTAL)

EXPERIMENTAL location->community proxy: conflates geography with ethnicity, aggregate-only, wrong for individuals and for mixed/urban/diaspora users.

<marimo-ui-element object-id='SFPL-0' random-id='60dedc6b-4f22-455d-dad4-c4dc5d0d301d'><marimo-dropdown data-initial-value='["Ruto"]' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eStance toward\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-options='["Ruto","Raila","Gachagua","Kalonzo","IEBC","Sifuna"]' data-allow-select-none='false' data-searchable='false' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-dropdown></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='BYtC-0' random-id='8cace94b-573a-6215-036d-f01de10e45a7'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.5937998294830322,\"author_handle\":\"HezMureithi\",\"text\":\"WHO would You VOTE \\ud83d\\uddf3 as the PRESIDENT of Kenya \\ud83c\\uddf0\\ud83c\\uddea in 2027 between former Cs Fred Matiang'i , Senator Okiya Omtatah , former CJ David Maraga and former Governor Kivutha Kibwana \\u2753\\ufe0f\\n#KenyaDecides2027\\n#RutoMustGo\\n#KenyansDecide2027\\n#Kenya's 6\\ufe0f\\u20e3th PRESIDENT\"},{\"stance\":\"opposes\",\"stance_score\":0.9721199870109558,\"author_handle\":\"smutoro\",\"text\":\"Opposition\\u2019s new masterplan: Block Ruto from hitting 51% in round one \\u2014 then form a grand SRA \\u201c#StopRutoAlliance\\u201d in the runoff. Basically, lose separately first\\u2026 then unite in panic. #KenyaDecides2027 https://t.co/s28qPOm6hK\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.9888851642608643,\"author_handle\":\"patricksafariR\",\"text\":\"Hii nayo imeweza..itafanya Ruto asiamini wetaa na madvd......\\nThis is a strong message that Mulembe Nation will be part of Komboa Kenya.\\nPeople are ready for kalonzo musyoka's presidency.\\n#KomboaKenya https://t.co/hu7FkwVZj8\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.6666860580444336,\"author_handle\":\"dkmaraga\",\"text\":\"I am deeply grateful to Hon. @MarthaKarua, Presidential Aspirant and Leader of the @PLPartyKenya for joining us today at Ufungamano House for the @UGMParty State of the Nation. \\n\\nOur journey of working together started many years ago when you served this county with courage as a Magistrate. \\n\\nTogether we will deliver for Kenyans the #Ukombozi from this extractive state led by the Ruto regime.\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.9800980091094971,\"author_handle\":\"MusaliaMudavadi\",\"text\":\"On the margins of the G7 Summit in \\u00c9vian-les-Bains, France, I joined H.E. President @WilliamsRuto for bilateral talks with H.E. President @ZelenskyyUa of Ukraine, as Kenya continues to strengthen its engagement with key global partners.\\n\\nThe discussions focused on expanding cooperation in trade, agriculture, education, technology and peacebuilding, while exploring new opportunities that can deliver tangible benefits for our people and economies.\\n\\nThe meeting reflects Kenya's growing diplomatic capital and its increasing role as a credible voice in international affairs. As our global partnerships deepen, so too do the opportunities for investment, knowledge exchange, market access and innovation that support Kenya's development agenda.\\n\\nKenya remains committed to dialogue, international cooperation and a rules-based global order anchored on peace, security and shared prosperity. Through active engagement on the global stage, we continue to position our country not merely as a participant in international discussions, but as a constructive partner helping shape solutions to common challenges.\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.9446362257003784,\"author_handle\":\"UDAKenya\",\"text\":\"The Government, through the New Kenya Planters' Co-operative Union (KPCU), is distributing twenty (20) million coffee seedlings to farmers across the country ahead of the launch of the Coffee Revival Programme by H.E. President William Ruto on Monday, 22nd June 2026, in Kirinyaga County.\\n\\nThis milestone is a direct result of deliberate policy reforms undertaken to fulfill our 2022 Manifesto commitment of guaranteeing better returns for farmers through the Minimum Guaranteed Returns (MGR) framework.\\n\\nWe have streamlined the coffee value chain by restricting operators to a single licensing category, ending the era where cartels controlled the sector through multiple licenses held by a single entity, a practice that encouraged price manipulation and denied farmers fair earnings.\\n\\nThese reforms have already yielded tangible results, with coffee farmers now earning record returns of up to Ksh. 160 per kilogram. By putting more money directly into the hands of farmers, we are delivering on our Pesa Mfukoni promise\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.4182300269603729,\"author_handle\":\"ouma_neko\",\"text\":\"Kenyans,\\n\\nPower does not leave quietly. It clings, it schemes, it manipulates systems when it can no longer command the people.\\n\\nWilliam Ruto knows the ground has shifted. He can feel it in the silence of the crowds, in the anger of the youth, in the betrayal felt across regions that once believed in him. The country has moved on. The people have seen enough.\\n\\nWhat remains is not leadership it is calculation.\\n\\nWhen a leader loses the people, he runs to the system. To institutions. To backroom deals. To invisible hands that rewrite outcomes after the votes are cast.\\n\\nThat is where the real battle will be fought.\\n\\nThe @IEBCKenya must not be treated as sacred. \\n\\nIt must be questioned, audited, watched like a hawk. \\n\\nEvery form, every tally, every transmission nothing should pass without scrutiny.\\n\\nThe Supreme Court must not be feared. \\n\\nIt must be reminded that its loyalty is to the Constitution, not to power. \\n\\nJudges are not gods. They are servants of the law, and the law belongs to the people.\\n\\n2027 will not be stolen in broad daylight. \\n\\nIt will be stolen in silence  through systems, signatures, and decisions made behind closed doors.\\n\\nThat is why complacency is betrayal.\\n\\nIf Kenyans sleep, the system will decide for them.\\n\\nIf Kenyans look away, the outcome will be manufactured.\\n\\nIf Kenyans fear institutions, those institutions will be weaponized against them.\\n\\nThis is not just an election.\\n\\nIt is a confrontation between the will of the people and the machinery of power.\\n\\nAnd history is unforgiving to those who watch their future get stolen and do nothing about it let's meet on Thursday June 25th 2026.\"},{\"stance\":\"opposes\",\"stance_score\":0.7045942544937134,\"author_handle\":\"Naomikibandi\",\"text\":\"\\u201cNdindi Nyoro anafanya biashara nyingi sana za Ufisadi na Ruto na msingoje atoke kwa Ruto,anajifanya mweupe kama pamba mchana kwa Wakenya  lakini ako usiku wako na Ruto\\u201d-Bishop Israel exposes Ndindi Nyoro.\\nListen keenly https://t.co/SJOhYr2L0C\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.5224911570549011,\"author_handle\":\"Lightcasttvke\",\"text\":\"\\\"Ruto ameleta EBOLA kutoa pesa kwa wazungu, Ile serikali Matiang'i, Kalonzo, Gachagua, Babu, Sifuna watatengeneza itabadilisha mienendo ya vile wakenya wanaibiwa. Ruto is going home!\\\"~Onyonka https://t.co/W7zyp024AJ\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.9708088636398315,\"author_handle\":\"citizentvkenya\",\"text\":\"President William Ruto: To strengthen Kenya\\u2019s position as a global sporting nation, 26.4 billion has been allocated to complete 39 sports stadia in Kenya, prepare for AFCON in 2027, reward our outstanding sportsmen and women who represent Kenya on the international stage, and support sports competitions and tournaments nationwide\"}]"' data-total-rows='60' data-total-columns='4' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["stance",["string","str"]],["stance_score",["number","float64"]],["author_handle",["string","str"]],["text",["string","str"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-search='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>
